instructionalDaysDescription: The official IUSD Traditional Calendar lists 180 instructional days for ES/MS and 180 instructional days for high school.
seoDescription: View the IUSD 2025-2026 traditional academic calendar with Aug 19 first day, Jun 5 last day, holidays, breaks, printable PDF and ICS download.
calendarNotes: IUSD's 2025-2026 Traditional Calendar starts on August 19, 2025 and ends on June 5, 2026. Thanksgiving recess runs November 24-28, winter recess runs December 22-January 2, and spring recess runs March 30-April 3. The calendar lists 180 instructional days for ES/MS and high school.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Irvine Unified start school in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: Irvine Unified traditional-calendar students start school on Tuesday, August 19, 2025.

calendarFaqs.q: When is IUSD Spring Recess in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Recess on the IUSD 2025-2026 Traditional Calendar runs Monday, March 30 through Friday, April 3, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for IUSD in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day on the IUSD 2025-2026 Traditional Calendar is Friday, June 5, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: How many instructional days are in IUSD 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The official IUSD Traditional Calendar lists 180 instructional days for ES/MS and 180 instructional days for high school.

yearNumbers.label: Longest Instructional Stretch
yearNumbers.detail: The longest uninterrupted stretch after a major break runs from April 6 through May 22, before Memorial Day and the last week of school.

yearNumbers.label: No-School Mondays
yearNumbers.detail: Monday no-school weekdays include holidays, staff development days, and recess Mondays listed on the traditional calendar.

yearNumbers.label: School-Year Span
yearNumbers.detail: The traditional calendar runs from August 19, 2025 through June 5, 2026, giving families about 42 calendar weeks to coordinate instruction, breaks, camps, childcare, and summer planning.

events.name: PK-8 Floating Teacher Work Day
events.description: PK-8 floating teacher work day listed on the official traditional calendar.
